links.targetTitle: Revision History panel styling requires scoped CSS on document-editor-context since no props are exposed

title: model-editor wiring
content:
# model-editor wiring

The integration layer between document models and their editors.

## Core Wiring Pattern
- [[editors use the modern React hooks pattern from reactor-browser]] — the useSelectedXDocument pattern
- [[editors import action creators from gen/creators not from model source]] — correct import path for creators
- [[generateId from document-model/core provides deterministic IDs for dispatch]] — ID generation before dispatch
- [[useSelectedDocument hook is auto-generated per document model]] — auto-generated hooks per model

## Drive-Level Wiring
- [[apps use useSelectedDrive to access drive state and filter nodes]] — drive editors filter nodes by type

## By Editor
- [[service-offering editor wires four tab views to the service-offering model]] — ResourceTemplateSelector, ServiceCatalog, TierDefinition, TheMatrix
- [[subscription-instance editor provides client and operator views with billing]] — dual-mode with ImportServiceConfigButton bridge to ServiceOffering
- [[resource-template editor manages template info and facet targeting]] — simplest editor, two components
- [[resource-instance editor manages provisioning lifecycle and facet configuration]] — most action creator imports (17), lifecycle state machine

## By Document Model

| Model | Editor | Hook | Modules Used |
|-------|--------|------|--------------|
| service-offering | service-offering-editor | useSelectedServiceOfferingDocument | offering, services, tiers, option-groups, service-groups, configuration |
| subscription-instance | subscription-instance-editor | useSelectedSubscriptionInstanceDocument | subscription, service, service-group, metrics, customer |
| resource-template | resource-template-editor | useSelectedResourceTemplateDocument | template-management, facet-targeting |
| resource-instance | resource-instance-editor | useSelectedResourceInstanceDocument | instance-management, configuration-management |
| facet | (no dedicated editor) | useFacetDocument | — |

## Cross-Model Editors
- [[subscription-instance editor provides client and operator views with billing]] — imports from ServiceOffering via mapOfferingToSubscription

---

description: Which document model feeds which editor — hook imports, dispatch targets, state reads, helper dependencies
